caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional microphone and wearing large over-ear headphones. He is dressed in a black jacket over a gray shirt, and he sits against a dark, sound-dampening wall with a ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man exhibits a series of facial expressions while remaining seated. Initially, he looks forward with a neutral, attentive expression. He then shifts his gaze upward and rolls his eyes, suggesting a sense of disbelief or exasperation. He momentarily returns to a neutral gaze, looking straight ahead. Finally, he glances sharply to his right with a slight pout, his eyes widening in a reactive expression. Throughout these shifts in expression, he remains stationary behind the microphone, which is held in place by a black boom arm.
